mapper.select: select id, user_id, risk_level, risk_score, capacity_score, attitude_score, knowledge_score, liquidity_score, investment_horizon_months, max_drawdown_tolerance, experience_level, investment_goal, liquidity_need, income_range, asset_range, profile_tags, profile_summary, source, status, assessed_at, expires_at, created_at, updated_at from user_risk_profile where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_risk_profile ( user_id, risk_level, risk_score, capacity_score, attitude_score, knowledge_score, liquidity_score, investment_horizon_months, max_drawdown_tolerance, experience_level, investment_goal, liquidity_need, income_range, asset_range, profile_tags, profile_summary, source, status, assessed_at, expires_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskScore}, #{capacityScore}, #{attitudeScore}, #{knowledgeScore}, #{liquidityScore}, #{investmentHorizonMonths}, #{maxDrawdownTolerance}, #{experienceLevel}, #{investmentGoal}, #{liquidityNeed}, #{incomeRange}, #{assetRange}, #{profileTags}, #{profileSummary}, #{source}, #{status}, #{assessedAt}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.update: update user_risk_profile set risk_level = #{riskLevel}, risk_score = #{riskScore}, capacity_score = #{capacityScore}, attitude_score = #{attitudeScore}, knowledge_score = #{knowledgeScore}, liquidity_score = #{liquidityScore}, investment_horizon_months = #{investmentHorizonMonths}, max_drawdown_tolerance = #{maxDrawdownTolerance}, experience_level = #{experienceLevel}, investment_goal = #{investmentGoal}, liquidity_need = #{liquidityNeed}, income_range = #{incomeRange}, asset_range = #{assetRange}, profile_tags = #{profileTags}, profile_summary = #{profileSummary}, source = #{source}, status = #{status}, assessed_at = #{assessedAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_risk_assessment ( user_id, assessment_no, questionnaire_version, risk_level, risk_score, capacity_score, attitude_score, knowledge_score, liquidity_score, investment_horizon_months, max_drawdown_tolerance, result_summary, raw_result_json, source ) values ( #{userId}, #{assessmentNo}, #{questionnaireVersion}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskScore}, #{capacityScore}, #{attitudeScore}, #{knowledgeScore}, #{liquidityScore}, #{investmentHorizonMonths}, #{maxDrawdownTolerance}, #{resultSummary}, #{rawResultJson}, #{source} )
